name: LED TMH-H240

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F4878201-3C9F-425E-9C14-231E30944B9E

comment:
Moving head hybrid beam/wash/flower with 6 RGBW beams independently controllable, zoom, beam spread rotation, and a lot of channels!  Enjoy!!

Notes:
The beams won't display in GrandMA3 3D.  Having done some tests with other variations of the profile, I think it's just too complex a fixture for the GMA3 3D to work out.  If anyone gets it working, please let me know! 

Versions:
v1.000 Release version
v1:001 Added text notes.  Corrected Zoom default value
